description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a light-colored exterior, featuring multiple stories and a spacious driveway leading to a three-car garage. The front yard is landscaped with various trees, shrubs, and a central garden area, while the driveway provides ample space for parking. The house has a complex roofline with both gable and hip elements, and numerous windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern across the facade. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with columns and a set of steps, giving it a welcoming appearance. The rear and side yards are also landscaped, with outdoor seating areas and additional greenery. The overall design suggests a contemporary take on traditional American residential architecture, blending comfort with curb appeal.
description: A large, modern suburban house with a light facade, landscaped front yard, three-car garage, and a prominent entryway with columns and steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped yard, driveway, and three-car garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and additional landscaping along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, outdoor seating area, and more trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side yard, and a different angle of the front garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some large windows and regular spacing
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to a central door, and decorative landscaping
